---
title: "Repressions against residents of Kryvyi Rih, 1937–1938"
subtitle: "City population at the time ≈ 197,600"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
body, .main-container, .container-fluid,
div, section, article, p, hr {
  background-color: #f5f0e8;
}
.main-container {
  max-width: 100%;
  padding: 4rem 6rem;
}
.plot-container, img, .html-widget, canvas {
  background-color: #f5f0e8 !important;
  border: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}
```

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=9}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggimage)
library(patchwork)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(waffle)
library(here)

# --- fonts ---
font_add_google("IBM Plex Sans", "plex")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)

# --- palette ---
col_ink <- "#1a1a1a"
col_paper <- "#f5f0e8"
col_red <- "#c0392b"

# --- shared theme ---
theme_repression <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_family = "plex") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(
        family = "plex", size = 13,
        face = "bold", color = col_ink,
        margin = margin(b = 4)
      ),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(
        family = "plex", size = 11,
        color = col_ink, margin = margin(b = 10)
      ),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = col_ink),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(12, 16, 12, 12)
    )
}

# ============================================================
# PANEL 1: barbed wire charges bar chart
# ============================================================
charges <- read_csv(here("data/charges.csv")) %>%
  mutate(
    is_espionage = str_detect(charge, "[Ee]spionage|[Ss]py"),
    charge = str_wrap(charge, 30),
    charge = fct_reorder(charge, n),
    charge = fct_relevel(charge,
      "Other (18 further charges)",
      "Unknown",
      after = 0
    )
  )

wire_plain <- here("figs/Barbed_wire.png")
wire_red <- here("figs/Barbed_wire_red.png")

knot_data <- charges %>%
  mutate(img = if_else(is_espionage, wire_red, wire_plain)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(x_pos = list(seq(3, n, by = 38))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(x_pos)

p1 <- ggplot(charges, aes(x = n, y = charge)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = n, y = charge, yend = charge, color = is_espionage),
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = col_red, "FALSE" = col_ink), guide = "none") +
  geom_image(
    data = knot_data,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = charge, image = img),
    size = 0.028
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n, color = is_espionage),
    hjust = -0.4, size = 3.5, family = "plex"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "richtext",
    x = 200, y = 6.5,
    label = paste0("<span style='color:", col_red, "'>**31% faced espionage charges**</span><br>most were workers with no access<br>to any state secrets"),
    hjust = 0, size = 3.5, family = "plex",
    fill = NA, label.color = NA, color = col_ink
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.3)),
    breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title    = "Charges",
    subtitle = "With 1,878 of documented cases, the true number is estimated to be at least 20% higher"
  ) +
  theme_repression() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 14)),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.33),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = -2.91)
  )

# ============================================================
# PANEL 2: waffle chart — sentences
# ============================================================

sentences <- read_csv(here("data/sentences.csv"))

verdict_order <- c(
  "Executed",
  "Labor camp (10 years)",
  "Labor camp (8-9 years)",
  "Labor camp (6-7 years)",
  "Labor camp (3-5 years)",
  "Exile / deportation",
  "Other",
  "Unknown"
)

waffle_colors <- c(
  "Executed"               = col_red,
  "Labor camp (10 years)"  = "#3a3a3a",
  "Labor camp (8-9 years)" = "#626262",
  "Labor camp (6-7 years)" = "#8a8a8a",
  "Labor camp (3-5 years)" = "#b2b2b2",
  "Exile / deportation"    = "#c4c0f0",
  "Other"                  = "#7f77dd",
  "Unknown"                = "#9f99e0"
)

waffle_counts <- sentences %>%
  mutate(verdict = factor(verdict, levels = verdict_order)) %>%
  arrange(verdict) %>%
  mutate(sq = pmax(round(pct), 1)) %>%
  {
    df <- .
    df$sq[1] <- df$sq[1] + (100 - sum(df$sq))
    df
  } %>%
  pull(sq, name = verdict) %>%
  rev()

p2 <- waffle(
  waffle_counts,
  rows       = 5,
  colors     = waffle_colors[names(waffle_counts)],
  size       = 0.3,
  legend_pos = "right",
  flip       = TRUE,
  pad        = 0
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = waffle_colors,
    breaks = verdict_order
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Sentences",
    subtitle = "Each square ≈ 19 people"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1)) +
  theme_repression() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.06),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.15),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = col_ink, family = "plex"),
    legend.key.height = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.margin = margin(t = -352),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0, "pt"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
    plot.margin = margin(12, 16, 12, 0)
  )

# ============================================================
# COMPOSE
# ============================================================

(p1 | p2) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(3, 1)) &
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  )
```

---

<div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; font-size:0.8em; color:#666; margin-top:20px;">
  <table style="border-collapse:collapse; text-align:left;">
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:bold; padding-right:12px; white-space:nowrap; vertical-align:top;">Data source</td>
      <td>Melnyk, Oleksandr. 2017. <em>Repressions of 1937–1938 in Kryvyi Rih</em>. Kryvyi Rih City Museum of Local History and Studies.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:bold; padding-right:12px; white-space:nowrap; vertical-align:top;">Visualisation</td>
      <td>Olena Tykhostup &middot; <a href="https://github.com/Olena-Tykhostup/kryvyi-rih-repressions-1937-38" style="color:#666;">github.com/Olena-Tykhostup/kryvyi-rih-repressions-1937-38</a></td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>
